---
title: "Home"
image: images/profile.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  image: images/profile.jpg
  image-width: 180px
  links:
    - text: "<img src='images/lattes.jpeg' width='16'> Lattes"
      href: http://lattes.cnpq.br/7482419947297746
    - icon: google
      text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=7SsaizIAAAAJ&hl=en
    - text: "<img src='images/orcid.png' width='16'> ORCID"
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0001-8432-2637
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/lhenriquelima
---

## Luis Henrique de Lima

Adjunct Professor  
Federal University of Technology – Paraná (UTFPR)  
Ponta Grossa-PR, Brazil

---

### Research Interests

Surface science, two-dimensional materials, STM/STS, XPS/XPD/ARPES, DFT, and machine learning applied to surface analysis.

---

### Research Overview

My research focuses on the relationship between atomic structure and electronic/magnetic properties of surfaces, particularly in low-dimensional systems.

I combine experimental techniques with first-principles simulations to investigate supported nanostructures and two-dimensional materials.
